info.title: Enterprise Social Media Platform API
info.description: Enterprise social media backend with secure identity, profiles, social graph, posts, feeds, stories, pages, groups, real-time chat, notifications, moderation, analytics and auditability.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api V1 Sessions Get
Response List Organizations Api V1 Organizations Get
Response List Members Api V1 Organizations  Organization Id  Members Get
Response List Invitations Api V1 Organizations  Organization Id  Invitations Get
Response List Permissions Api V1 Rbac Permissions Get
Response List Roles Api V1 Rbac Roles Get
Response List Api Keys Api V1 Api Keys Get
Response List Members Api V1 Chat Conversations  Conversation Id  Members Get
Response Add Members Api V1 Chat Conversations  Conversation Id  Members Post
Response List Receipts Api V1 Chat Messages  Message Id  Receipts Get
Response List Pins Api V1 Chat Conversations  Conversation Id  Pins Get
Response Search Users Api V1 Chat Users Get
Response Conversation Presence Api V1 Chat Conversations  Conversation Id  Presence Get
Response List Blocks Api V1 Chat Blocks Get
Response List Reports Api V1 Chat Moderation Reports Get
Response Discover People Api V1 Social People Discover Get
Response List Followers Api V1 Social Profiles  User Id  Followers Get
Response List Following Api V1 Social Profiles  User Id  Following Get
Response Incoming Requests Api V1 Social Friends Requests Incoming Get
Response Outgoing Requests Api V1 Social Friends Requests Outgoing Get
Response List Friends Api V1 Social Friends Get
Response Stories Feed Api V1 Social Stories Feed Get
Response Story Viewers Api V1 Social Stories  Story Id  Viewers Get
Response List Pages Api V1 Social Pages Get
Response List Page Admins Api V1 Social Pages  Page Id  Admins Get
Response List Groups Api V1 Social Groups Get
Response List Group Members Api V1 Social Groups  Group Id  Members Get
Response List Reports Api V1 Social Moderation Reports Get
Response Trending Hashtags Api V1 Social Analytics Trending Hashtags Get

warning.title: Warning
warning.default: Copy this API key now. It will not be shown again.

warning.title: Warning
warning.default: Store these codes securely. Each code can be used only once.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Registration, login, rotating tokens, recovery and profile security.

tags.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
tags.description: TOTP enrollment, recovery codes and MFA lifecycle.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Scoped machine credentials with rotation and revocation.

tags.name: Administration
tags.description: Enterprise user administration and account controls.

tags.name: Social Profiles & Relationships
tags.description: Profiles, privacy, follows, friendships and people discovery.

tags.name: Posts, Feed & Stories
tags.description: Publishing, personalized feeds, comments, reactions, saved posts and stories.

tags.name: Pages & Groups
tags.description: Creator pages, communities, membership and administration.

tags.name: Social Moderation & Analytics
tags.description: Content reporting, enforcement, verification, trending topics and analytics.

tags.name: Conversations
tags.description: Direct, group and channel lifecycle, memberships and invite links.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: Message history, attachments, reactions, receipts, pins and search.

tags.name: Chat Users
tags.description: Presence, user discovery, blocking and notification preferences.

tags.name: Moderation
tags.description: Reports, mute/ban actions and chat analytics.

tags.name: Realtime WebSocket
tags.description: Bidirectional events for messages, typing, receipts, reactions and presence.
